picocad;bunda;6;1;15
{
{
 name='cube', pos={0,0,0}, rot={0,0,0},
 v={
  {-0.5,-0.5,-0.5},
  {0.5,-0.5,-0.5},
  {0.5,0.5,-0.5},
  {-0.5,0.5,-0.5},
  {-0.5,-0.5,0.5},
  {0.5,-0.5,0.5},
  {0.5,0.5,0.5},
  {-0.5,0.5,0.5}
 },
 f={
  {1,2,3,4, c=11, uv={8.5,0.25,15.75,0.25,15.75,7.5,8.5,7.5} },
  {6,5,8,7, c=11, uv={0.25,0,8,0,8,7.75,0.25,7.75} },
  {5,6,2,1, c=11, uv={10,0.5,11,0.5,11,1.5,10,1.5} },
  {5,1,4,8, c=11, uv={10.25,0.5,11.25,0.5,11.25,1.5,10.25,1.5} },
  {2,6,7,3, c=11, uv={10,0.5,11,0.5,11,1.5,10,1.5} },
  {4,3,7,8, c=11, uv={10,0.5,11,0.5,11,1.5,10,1.5} }
 } 
}
}%

88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
88888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888880088888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888888
